views.definition:
SELECT po.id,
    po.type,
    po.project,
    po.description,
    po.note,
    po.object,
    po.requester_id,
    po.code,
    po.payment_method,
    po.budget_id,
    po.cost_center,
    po.budget_user_id,
    po.provider_id,
    po.currency,
    po.leasing,
    po.total_price,
    po.state,
    po.created_document,
    po.created,
    po.updated,
    po.deleted,
    po.budget_increment_id,
    po.subtracted_from_budget,
    po.provider_offer_date,
    po.provider_offer_code,
    po.reference_warehouse,
    po.advance_payment,
    p.company_name AS provider_company_name,
    p.state AS provider_state,
    b.name AS budget_name,
    b.year AS budget_year,
    u.email AS requester_email,
    pm.code AS payment_method_code,
    pm.description AS payment_method_description,
    ( SELECT min(a.level) AS min
           FROM rda.approval a
          WHERE ((a.order_id = po.id) AND ((po.state)::text = 'PENDING_APPROVAL'::text) AND (NOT (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
                   FROM rda.approval a2
                  WHERE ((a2.order_id = po.id) AND (a2.level = a.level) AND ((a2.state)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['APPROVED'::character varying, 'REJECTED'::character varying])::text[])))))))) AS current_approval_level
   FROM (((((rda.purchase_order po
     LEFT JOIN provider_qualifications.provider p ON ((p.id = po.provider_id)))
     LEFT JOIN budgets.budget b ON ((b.id = po.budget_id)))
     LEFT JOIN users_int."user" u ON ((u.id = po.requester_id)))
     LEFT JOIN provider_qualifications.payment_method pm ON ((pm.code = po.payment_method)))
     LEFT JOIN rda.reference_warehouse wh ON (((wh.name)::text = (po.reference_warehouse)::text)));

functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.create_purchase_order_row(_order_id bigint, _json_data json)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
    DECLARE
        _new_row_id bigint;
    BEGIN
        IF EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM rda.purchase_order WHERE id=_order_id AND state <> 'DRAFT') THEN
            RAISE EXCEPTION 'Document ID % is not editable. The order state is not "draft" state', _order_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ3';
        END IF;
        INSERT INTO rda.purchase_order_row (
            order_id,
            type,
            price,
            qty,
            mrc,
            nrc,
            max_evaluated_price,
            min_evaluated_price,
            product_code,
            product_description,
            description,
            total
        )
        VALUES (
            _order_id,
            (_json_data->>'type')::varchar,
            ROUND(NULLIF(_json_data->>'price', '')::numeric, 5),
            (_json_data->>'qty')::int,
            ROUND(NULLIF(_json_data->>'mrc', '')::numeric, 5),
            ROUND(NULLIF(_json_data->>'activation_price', '')::numeric, 5),
            (_json_data->>'max_evaluated_price')::numeric(20,5),
            (_json_data->>'min_evaluated_price')::numeric(20,5),
            (_json_data->>'product_code')::varchar,
            (_json_data->>'product_description')::varchar,
            (_json_data->>'description')::text,
            ROUND((_json_data->>'total')::numeric, 5)
        )
        RETURNING id INTO _new_row_id;

        RETURN json_build_object(
            'row_id', _new_row_id
        );
    END;
$function$

functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.po_check_provider_approval(_po_id bigint)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _provider_id bigint;
    _provider_usable boolean;
    _missing_or_unusable boolean;
BEGIN
    -- check PO exists
    IF NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM rda.purchase_order WHERE id = _po_id
    ) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION
            '[po_check_provider_approval] PO with id % not found',
            _po_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ0';
    END IF;

    -- load provider_id
    SELECT provider_id
    INTO _provider_id
    FROM rda.purchase_order
    WHERE id = _po_id;

    -- check provider usable
    SELECT ps.usable
    INTO _provider_usable
    FROM provider_qualifications.provider p
             JOIN provider_qualifications.provider_state ps
                  ON ps.name = p.state
    WHERE p.id = _provider_id;

    IF COALESCE(_provider_usable, FALSE) = FALSE THEN
        RETURN FALSE;
    END IF;

    /*
     * For every category required by the articles in this PO,
     * the provider must have a usable provider_category
     */
    SELECT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM (
                 -- distinct categories required by the PO via articles
                 SELECT DISTINCT ac.category_id
                 FROM rda.purchase_order_row por
                          JOIN articles.article a
                               ON a.code = por.product_code
                          JOIN articles.article_category ac
                               ON ac.article_code = a.code
                 WHERE por.order_id = _po_id
             ) required_cat
                 LEFT JOIN provider_qualifications.provider_category pc
                           ON pc.provider_id = _provider_id
                               AND pc.category_id = required_cat.category_id
                 LEFT JOIN provider_qualifications.provider_category_state pcs
                           ON pcs.name = pc.state
        WHERE
            pc.id IS NULL          -- provider missing category qualification
           OR pcs.usable = FALSE -- category qualification not usable
           OR pcs.usable IS NULL
    )
    INTO _missing_or_unusable;

    RETURN NOT _missing_or_unusable;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.po_history_get_all(_filter_struct json)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _search_pattern varchar;
BEGIN

    SELECT concat('%', _filter_struct ->> 'search_string', '%') INTO _search_pattern;

    RETURN COALESCE(
        (
            SELECT jsonb_agg(x)
            FROM (
                SELECT *
                FROM rda.purchase_order_history
                WHERE description LIKE _search_pattern
                AND ( _filter_struct ->> 'order_id' IS NULL OR order_id = (_filter_struct ->> 'order_id')::bigint)
                AND ( _filter_struct ->> 'user_id' IS NULL OR user_id = (_filter_struct ->> 'user_id')::bigint)
                AND ( _filter_struct ->> 'prev_state' IS NULL OR prev_state = _filter_struct ->> 'prev_state')
                AND ( _filter_struct ->> 'next_state' IS NULL OR next_state = _filter_struct ->> 'next_state')
                ORDER BY timestamp DESC
            )x
        ),
        '[]'::jsonb
    );

END;
$function$

functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.purchase_order_approve(p_order_id bigint, p_user_id bigint)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_po_state varchar;
    v_current_level int;
BEGIN
    -- Lock and get current PO state
    SELECT state
    INTO v_po_state
    FROM rda.purchase_order
    WHERE id = p_order_id
        FOR UPDATE;

    IF v_po_state IS NULL OR v_po_state <> 'PENDING_APPROVAL' THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'PO % is not in an approvable state', p_order_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ3';
    END IF;

    -- Check authorization
    IF NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM users_int.user u
                 JOIN users_int.role r ON r.name = u.role
        WHERE u.id = p_user_id
          AND r.is_approver = true
    ) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'User % is not authorized to approve PO %', p_user_id, p_order_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ2';
    END IF;

    -- Determine the current approval level (lowest level not approved/rejected)
    SELECT MIN(a.level)
    INTO v_current_level
    FROM rda.approval a
    WHERE a.order_id = p_order_id
      AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM rda.approval a2
        WHERE a2.order_id = a.order_id
          AND a2.level = a.level
          AND a2.state IN ('APPROVED','REJECTED')
    );

    IF v_current_level IS NULL THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'No pending approval level found for PO %', p_order_id;
    END IF;

    -- Update the approval row for the user at the current level
    UPDATE rda.approval
    SET state = 'APPROVED',
        updated = now()
    WHERE order_id = p_order_id
      AND approver_id = p_user_id
      AND level = v_current_level
      AND state IN ('SENT');

    -- Ensure at least one row was updated
    IF NOT FOUND THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'User % cannot approve PO % at level % or it is not in a pending state',
            p_user_id, p_order_id, v_current_level;
    END IF;

END;
$function$

functions.name: purchase_order_approve_document_check
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.purchase_order_approve_document_check(_po_id bigint, _user_id bigint)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _owner_id BIGINT;
    _state VARCHAR;
BEGIN
    -- get PO owner, state
    SELECT requester_id, state
    INTO _owner_id, _state
    FROM rda.purchase_order
    WHERE id = _po_id
      AND deleted IS NULL;

    -- check if po exists
    IF NOT FOUND THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'purchase order not found' USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ0';
    END IF;

    -- check state valid
    IF _state <> 'PENDING_CHECK_DOCUMENT' THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'purchase order is not in a state to approve document check'
            USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ3';
    END IF;

    ----------------------------------------
    -- history + state transition
    ----------------------------------------
    INSERT INTO rda.purchase_order_history (
        order_id,
        automatic,
        user_id,
        prev_state,
        next_state,
        description
    )
    VALUES (
               _po_id,
               FALSE,
               _user_id,
               'PENDING_CHECK_DOCUMENT',
               'PENDING_APPROVAL_PROVIDER',
               'Allegati controllati e ok'
           );

    UPDATE rda.purchase_order
    SET state = 'PENDING_APPROVAL_PROVIDER',
        updated = NOW()
    WHERE id = _po_id;

END;
$function$

functions.name: purchase_order_approve_no_leasing
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.purchase_order_approve_no_leasing(p_order_id bigint, p_user_id bigint)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_po_state varchar;
BEGIN
    -- Check user authorization: approver without leasing
    IF NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM users_int.user u
                 JOIN users_int.role r ON r.name = u.role
        WHERE u.id = p_user_id
          AND r.is_approver_no_leasing = true
    ) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'unauthorized'
            USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ2';
    END IF;

    -- Lock and read current state
    SELECT state
    INTO v_po_state
    FROM rda.purchase_order
    WHERE id = p_order_id
        FOR UPDATE;

    -- Validate state
    IF v_po_state IS NULL OR v_po_state <> 'PENDING_APPROVAL_NO_LEASING' THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'invalid state'
            USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ3';
    END IF;

    -- Update purchase order
    UPDATE rda.purchase_order
    SET state   = 'PENDING_CONTRACT_VERIFICATION',
        leasing = false,
        updated = now()
    WHERE id = p_order_id;

    -- History
    INSERT INTO rda.purchase_order_history (
        order_id,
        user_id,
        description,
        prev_state,
        next_state,
        automatic
    ) VALUES (
                 p_order_id,
                 p_user_id,
                 'Approved without leasing',
                 v_po_state,
                 'PENDING_CONTRACT_VERIFICATION',
                 false
             );
END;
$function$

functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.purchase_order_close(_po_id bigint, _user_id bigint)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _state VARCHAR;
    _owner_id BIGINT;
BEGIN
    -- get current state and owner
    SELECT state, requester_id
    INTO _state, _owner_id
    FROM rda.purchase_order
    WHERE id = _po_id
      AND deleted IS NULL
        FOR UPDATE;

    -- check if po exists
    IF NOT FOUND THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'purchase order not found'
            USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ0';
    END IF;

    -- check ownership
    IF _owner_id IS NULL OR _owner_id <> _user_id THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'user not authorized to close this purchase order'
            USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ2';
    END IF;

    -- validate state transition
    IF _state <> 'PENDING_SEND' THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'purchase order is not in PENDING_SEND state'
            USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ3';
    END IF;

    ----------------------------------------
    -- history + state transition
    ----------------------------------------
    INSERT INTO rda.purchase_order_history (
        order_id,
        automatic,
        user_id,
        prev_state,
        next_state,
        description
    )
    VALUES (
               _po_id,
               FALSE,
               _user_id,
               'PENDING_SEND',
               'CLOSED',
               'PO inviato al fornitore e chiuso'
           );

    UPDATE rda.purchase_order
    SET state = 'CLOSED',
        updated = NOW()
    WHERE id = _po_id;

END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.purchase_order_created_leasing(p_order_id bigint, p_user_id bigint)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_po_state varchar;
    v_new_state varchar := 'PENDING_SEND';
    v_description text := 'Leasing created';
BEGIN
    -- Authorization
    IF NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM users_int.user u
                 JOIN users_int.role r ON r.name = u.role
        WHERE u.id = p_user_id
          AND r.is_afc = true
    ) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'unauthorized'
            USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ2';
    END IF;

    -- Fetch current PO state
    SELECT state
    INTO v_po_state
    FROM rda.purchase_order
    WHERE id = p_order_id;

    IF v_po_state IS NULL OR v_po_state <> 'PENDING_LEASING_ORDER_CREATION' THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'invalid state'
            USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ3';
    END IF;

    -- Update purchase order
    UPDATE rda.purchase_order
    SET state   = v_new_state,
        leasing = true,
        updated = now()
    WHERE id = p_order_id;

    -- Insert history record
    INSERT INTO rda.purchase_order_history (
        order_id,
        user_id,
        description,
        prev_state,
        next_state,
        automatic
    ) VALUES (
                 p_order_id,
                 p_user_id,
                 v_description,
                 v_po_state,
                 v_new_state,
                 false
             );

END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.purchase_order_details(_order_id bigint)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
    DECLARE
        _results jsonb;
    BEGIN

        -- check PO exists
        IF NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM rda.purchase_order WHERE id = _order_id) THEN
            RAISE EXCEPTION '[purchase_order_details] PO with id % not found', _order_id USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ0';
        END IF;

        SELECT jsonb_build_object(
                'id', id,
                'state', state,
                'current_approval_level', current_approval_level,
                'type', type,
                'description', description,
                'note', note,
                'object', object,
                'code', code,
                'project', project,
                'total_price', total_price,
                'rows', rda.get_purchase_order_rows_detail(_order_id),
                'created', created,
                'updated', updated,
                'deleted', deleted,
                'provider_offer_code', provider_offer_code,
                'provider_offer_date', provider_offer_date,
                'reference_warehouse', reference_warehouse,
                'reference_warehouse_details', (SELECT to_jsonb(rw) FROM rda.reference_warehouse rw WHERE name = reference_warehouse),
                'provider', provider_qualifications.provider_get(provider_id, TRUE),
                'payment_method', (SELECT to_jsonb(pm)  FROM provider_qualifications.payment_method pm WHERE code = payment_method),
                'leasing', leasing,
                'budget', jsonb_build_object(
                    'id', budget_id,
                    'name', budget_name,
                    'year', budget_year,
                    'budget_user_id', budget_user_id,
                    'cost_center', cost_center
                ),
                'requester', users_int.user_get(requester_id),
               'budget_user_id', budget_user_id,
               'currency', currency,
                'budget_increment_needed', budgets.compute_budget_increment_needed(budget_id, cost_center, budget_user_id, total_price),
                'pdf_generation_date', created_document,
                'attachments', rda.get_purchase_order_attachments(_order_id),
               'recipients', rda.purchase_order_get_recipients(_order_id),
               'approvers', rda.approvers_get_for_po(_order_id)
            )
        INTO _results
        FROM rda.purchase_order_full
        WHERE id = _order_id
        AND deleted IS NULL;

        IF _results IS NULL THEN
            RAISE EXCEPTION 'Document ID % does not exist.', _order_id USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ0';
        END IF;

        RETURN _results;
    END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.purchase_order_edit(_json_data json)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _order_id bigint;
    _contact_id bigint;
BEGIN
    _order_id := (_json_data ->> 'id')::bigint;

    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM rda.purchase_order WHERE id = _order_id AND deleted IS NULL) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION '[purchase_order_edit] PO with id % not found', _order_id USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ0';
    end if;

    -- check if editable
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM rda.purchase_order WHERE id = _order_id AND state = 'DRAFT') THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION '[purchase_order_edit] PO with id % is not in DRAFT state', _order_id USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ3';
    end if;

    UPDATE rda.purchase_order
        SET
            type = COALESCE(_json_data->>'type', type),
            requester_id = COALESCE((_json_data->>'requester_id')::bigint, requester_id),
            reference_warehouse = COALESCE(_json_data->>'reference_warehouse', reference_warehouse),
            payment_method = COALESCE(_json_data->>'payment_method', payment_method),
            budget_id = COALESCE((_json_data->>'budget_id')::bigint, budget_id),
            budget_user_id = COALESCE((_json_data->>'budget_user_id')::bigint, budget_user_id),
            cost_center = COALESCE(_json_data->>'cost_center', cost_center),
            provider_id = COALESCE((_json_data->>'provider_id')::bigint, provider_id),
            project = COALESCE(_json_data->>'project', project),
            description = COALESCE(_json_data->>'description', description),
            note  = COALESCE(_json_data->>'note', note),
            object  = COALESCE(_json_data->>'object', object),
            currency = COALESCE(_json_data->>'currency', currency),
            provider_offer_date  = COALESCE((_json_data->>'provider_offer_date')::date, provider_offer_date),
            provider_offer_code = COALESCE(_json_data->>'provider_offer_code', provider_offer_code),
            state = COALESCE(_json_data->>'state', state),
            updated=NOW()
        WHERE id = _order_id;

    -- insert contacts
    if (_json_data->>'contact_ids') IS NOT NULL THEN

        -- DROP previously tied contacts
        DELETE FROM rda.purchase_order_provider_contacts WHERE order_id = _order_id;

        -- Add new ones
        for _contact_id in select * from json_array_elements_text(_json_data->'contact_ids')
        loop
            INSERT INTO rda.purchase_order_provider_contacts(order_id, contact_id) VALUES (
                _order_id,
                _contact_id
            );
        end loop;
    END IF;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.purchase_order_edit_state(_order_id bigint, _new_state character varying, _automatic boolean, _requester_id bigint, _description text)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _po record;
BEGIN

    SELECT * FROM rda.purchase_order WHERE id = _order_id AND deleted IS NULL INTO _po;

    IF (_po IS NULL) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION '[purchase_order_edit_state] PO with id % not found', _order_id USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ0';
    end if;


    -- add history entry

    INSERT INTO rda.purchase_order_history (
        order_id,
        automatic,
        user_id,
        prev_state,
        next_state,
        description
    )
    VALUES (
               _order_id,
               _automatic,
               _requester_id,
               _po.state,
               _new_state,
               _description
           );

    -- update state
    UPDATE rda.purchase_order SET state = _new_state, updated = NOW() WHERE id = _order_id;

END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.purchase_order_get_all(_requester_id bigint, _filter_struct jsonb)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _search_pattern text;
BEGIN
    _search_pattern := '%' || COALESCE(_filter_struct->>'search_string', '') || '%';

    RETURN COALESCE(
            (
                SELECT json_agg(
                               json_build_object(
                                       'id', po.id,
                                       'state', po.state,
                                       'type', po.type,
                                       'description', po.description,
                                       'note', po.note,
                                       'code', po.code,
                                       'project', po.project,
                                       'total_price', po.total_price,
                                       'created', po.created,
                                       'updated', po.updated,
                                       'provider_offer_code', po.provider_offer_code,
                                       'provider_offer_date', po.provider_offer_date,
                                       'updated', po.updated,
                                       'deleted', po.deleted,
                                       'currency', po.currency,
                                       'reference_warehouse', po.reference_warehouse,
                                       'provider', json_build_object(
                                               'id', po.provider_id,
                                               'company_name', po.provider_company_name,
                                               'state', po.provider_state
                                                   ),
                                       'payment_method', json_build_object(
                                               'code', po.payment_method_code,
                                               'description', po.payment_method_description
                                                         ),
                                       'budget', json_build_object(
                                               'id', po.budget_id,
                                               'name', po.budget_name,
                                               'year', po.budget_year,
                                               'cost_center', po.cost_center,
                                               'budget_user_id', po.budget_user_id
                                                 ),
                                       'requester', json_build_object(
                                               'id', po.requester_id,
                                               'email', po.requester_email
                                                    ),
                                       'current_approval_level', po.current_approval_level,
                                    'approvers', rda.approvers_brief_get_for_po(po.id)
                               )
                               ORDER BY po.created DESC
                       )
                FROM rda.purchase_order_full po
                WHERE deleted IS NULL
                  AND concat(id, description, provider_company_name) ILIKE _search_pattern
                  AND (_filter_struct->>'state' IS NULL OR state = _filter_struct->>'state')
                  AND (_filter_struct->>'budget_id' IS NULL OR budget_id = (_filter_struct->>'budget_id')::bigint)
                  AND (
                    (SELECT r.can_see_all_po
                     FROM users_int."user" u
                              JOIN users_int.role r ON u.role = r.name
                     WHERE u.id = _requester_id) IS TRUE
                        OR (
                        budget_id IN (SELECT budget_id
                                      FROM budgets.v_user_budget
                                      WHERE user_id = _requester_id)
                            AND (
                            budget_user_id = _requester_id
                                OR cost_center IN (SELECT cost_center
                                                   FROM budgets.v_user_budget
                                                   WHERE user_id = _requester_id)
                            )
                        )
                    )
            ),
            '[]'::json
           );
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.purchase_order_get_all_pending_approval(_approver_id bigint, _search_string text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _results jsonb;
BEGIN
    WITH po_base AS (
        SELECT *
        FROM rda.purchase_order_full
        WHERE deleted IS NULL
          AND state = 'PENDING_APPROVAL'
          AND (_search_string IS NULL
            OR COALESCE(description,'') ILIKE '%' || _search_string || '%'
            OR COALESCE(project,'') ILIKE '%' || _search_string || '%')
    ),
         po_access_filtered AS (
             SELECT po.*
             FROM po_base po
             WHERE
                 (
                     SELECT r.can_see_all_po
                     FROM users_int."user" u
                              JOIN users_int.role r ON u.role = r.name
                     WHERE u.id = _approver_id
                 ) IS TRUE
                OR EXISTS (
                 SELECT 1
                 FROM budgets.user_budget_approval_rule ubr
                 WHERE ubr.budget_id = po.budget_id
                   AND ubr.approver_id = _approver_id
             )
                OR EXISTS (
                 SELECT 1
                 FROM budgets.cost_center_budget_approval_rule cbr

                   AND cbr.cost_center = po.cost_center
                   AND cbr.approver_id = _approver_id
             )
         )
    SELECT COALESCE(
                   jsonb_agg(
                           jsonb_build_object(
                                   'id', po.id,
                                   'state', po.state,
                                   'type', po.type,
                                   'description', po.description,
                                   'note', po.note,
                                   'object', po.object,
                                   'project', po.project,
                                   'code', po.code,
                                   'provider_offer_code', po.provider_offer_code,
                                   'provider_offer_date', po.provider_offer_date,
                                   'total_price', po.total_price,
                                   'currency', po.currency,
                                   'created', po.created,
                                   'updated', po.updated,
                                   'reference_warehouse', po.reference_warehouse,
                                   'provider', jsonb_build_object(
                                           'id', po.provider_id,
                                           'company_name', po.provider_company_name,
                                           'state', po.provider_state
                                               ),
                                   'budget', jsonb_build_object(
                                           'id', po.budget_id,
                                           'name', po.budget_name,
                                           'year', po.budget_year,
                                           'cost_center', po.cost_center,
                                           'budget_user_id', po.budget_user_id
                                             ),

                                                ),
                                   'current_approval_level', po.current_approval_level
                           )
                           ORDER BY po.created DESC

           )
    INTO _results
    FROM po_access_filtered po;

    RETURN _results;
END;

                           )
                           ORDER BY po.created DESC
                   ),
                   '[]'::jsonb
           )
    INTO _results
    FROM po_access_filtered po;

    RETURN _results;
END;
$function$

functions.name: purchase_order_get_all_pending_leasing
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.purchase_order_get_all_pending_leasing(_approver_id bigint, _search_string text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _results jsonb;
BEGIN
    IF NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM users_int."user" u
                 JOIN users_int.role r ON u.role = r.name
        WHERE u.id = _approver_id
          AND r.is_afc = true
    ) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'user % is not authorized for leasing approvals', _approver_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ2';
    END IF;

    WITH po_base AS (
        SELECT *
        FROM rda.purchase_order_full
        WHERE deleted IS NULL
          AND state = 'PENDING_LEASING'
          AND (
            _search_string IS NULL
                OR COALESCE(description, '') ILIKE '%' || _search_string || '%'
                OR COALESCE(project, '') ILIKE '%' || _search_string || '%'
            )
    ),
         po_access_filtered AS (
             SELECT po.*
             FROM po_base po
             WHERE
                 (
                     SELECT r.can_see_all_po
                     FROM users_int."user" u
                              JOIN users_int.role r ON u.role = r.name
                     WHERE u.id = _approver_id
                 ) IS TRUE
                OR EXISTS (
                 SELECT 1
                 FROM budgets.user_budget_approval_rule ubr
                 WHERE ubr.budget_id = po.budget_id
                   AND ubr.approver_id = _approver_id
             )
                OR EXISTS (
                 SELECT 1
                 FROM budgets.cost_center_budget_approval_rule cbr
                 WHERE cbr.budget_id = po.budget_id
                   AND cbr.cost_center = po.cost_center
                   AND cbr.approver_id = _approver_id
             )
         )
    SELECT COALESCE(
                   jsonb_agg(
                           jsonb_build_object(
                                   'id', po.id,
                                   'state', po.state,
                                   'type', po.type,
                                   'description', po.description,
                                   'note', po.note,
                                   'object', po.object,
                                   'project', po.project,
                                   'total_price', po.total_price,
                                   'code', po.code,
                                   'provider_offer_code', po.provider_offer_code,
                                   'provider_offer_date', po.provider_offer_date,
                                   'currency', po.currency,
                                   'leasing', po.leasing,
                                   'created', po.created,
                                   'updated', po.updated,
                                   'reference_warehouse', po.reference_warehouse,
                                   'provider', jsonb_build_object(
                                           'id', po.provider_id,
                                           'company_name', po.provider_company_name,
                                           'state', po.provider_state
                                               ),
                                   'budget', jsonb_build_object(
                                           'id', po.budget_id,
                                           'name', po.budget_name,
                                           'year', po.budget_year,
                                           'cost_center', po.cost_center,
                                           'budget_user_id', po.budget_user_id
                                             ),
                                   'requester', jsonb_build_object(
                                           'id', po.requester_id,
                                           'email', po.requester_email
                                                )
                           )
                           ORDER BY po.created DESC
                   ),
                   '[]'::jsonb
           )
    INTO _results
    FROM po_access_filtered po;

    RETURN _results;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.purchase_order_get_all_sudo(_filter_struct jsonb)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _search_pattern varchar;
BEGIN

    SELECT concat('%', _filter_struct ->> 'search_string', '%') INTO _search_pattern;

    RETURN COALESCE(
        (
            SELECT jsonb_agg(
               rda.purchase_order_details(id)
               ORDER BY created DESC
            )
            FROM rda.purchase_order_full
            WHERE deleted IS NULL
                AND concat(id, description, provider_company_name) LIKE _search_pattern
                AND (_filter_struct->>'state' IS NULL OR state = _filter_struct->>'state')
                AND (_filter_struct->>'budget_id' IS NULL OR budget_id = (_filter_struct->>'budget_id')::bigint)
        ),
        '[]'::jsonb
    );
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.purchase_order_new(_json_data json)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
    DECLARE
        _new_order_id bigint;
        _order_code text;
        _contact_id bigint;
    BEGIN
        INSERT INTO rda."purchase_order" (
            "type",
            "requester_id",
            "budget_id",
            "budget_user_id",
            "payment_method",
            "cost_center",
            "project",
            "description",
            "note",
            "object",
            "provider_id",
            "currency",
            "reference_warehouse",
            "provider_offer_code",
            "provider_offer_date",
            "created"
        ) VALUES (
            _json_data->>'type',
            (_json_data->>'requester_id')::bigint,
            (_json_data->>'budget_id')::bigint,
            (_json_data->>'budget_user_id')::bigint,
            _json_data->>'payment_method',
            _json_data->>'cost_center',
            _json_data->>'project',
            _json_data->>'description',
            _json_data->>'note"',
            _json_data->>'object',
            (_json_data->>'provider_id')::bigint,
            _json_data->>'currency',
            _json_data->>'reference_warehouse',
            _json_data->>'provider_offer_code',
            (_json_data->>'provider_offer_date')::date,
            NOW()
        )
        RETURNING id INTO _new_order_id ;
        _order_code := 'PO-' || _new_order_id || '/' || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM NOW());

        UPDATE rda."purchase_order"
        SET code = _order_code
        WHERE id = _new_order_id;

        -- insert contacts
        if (_json_data->'contact_ids') IS NOT NULL THEN

            for _contact_id in select * from json_array_elements_text(_json_data->'contact_ids')
            loop
                INSERT INTO rda.purchase_order_provider_contacts(order_id, contact_id) VALUES (
                    _new_order_id,
                    _contact_id
                );
            end loop;
        END IF;

        RETURN json_build_object('id', _new_order_id);
    END;
$function$

functions.name: purchase_order_reject
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.purchase_order_reject(p_order_id bigint, p_user_id bigint)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_po_state varchar;
    v_new_state varchar := 'REJECTED';
    v_description text := 'Purchase order rejected';
    v_has_role boolean;
    v_rows_updated int;
BEGIN
    -- Lock and get current PO state
    SELECT state
    INTO v_po_state
    FROM rda.purchase_order
    WHERE id = p_order_id
        FOR UPDATE;

    IF v_po_state IS NULL THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'PO % does not exist', p_order_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ4';
    END IF;

    -- Authorization by state
    IF v_po_state = 'PENDING_APPROVAL' THEN
        SELECT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM users_int."user" u
                     JOIN users_int.role r ON r.name = u.role
            WHERE u.id = p_user_id
              AND r.is_approver = true
        ) INTO v_has_role;

    ELSIF v_po_state = 'PENDING_APPROVAL_NO_LEASING' THEN
        SELECT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM users_int."user" u
                     JOIN users_int.role r ON r.name = u.role
            WHERE u.id = p_user_id
              AND r.is_approver_no_leasing = true
        ) INTO v_has_role;

    ELSIF v_po_state = 'PENDING_APPROVAL_PAYMENT_METHOD' THEN
        SELECT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM users_int."user" u
                     JOIN users_int.role r ON r.name = u.role
            WHERE u.id = p_user_id
              AND r.is_afc = true
        ) INTO v_has_role;

    ELSE
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'PO % is not in a rejectable state: %',
            p_order_id, v_po_state
            USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ3';
    END IF;

    IF NOT v_has_role THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'User % not authorized to reject PO %',
            p_user_id, p_order_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ2';
    END IF;

    -- Update approval record
    UPDATE rda.approval
    SET state = 'REJECTED',
        updated = now()
    WHERE order_id = p_order_id
      AND approver_id = p_user_id
      AND state IN ('PENDING')
      AND level = (
        SELECT MIN(level)
        FROM rda.approval
        WHERE order_id = p_order_id
          AND state IN ('PENDING')
    )
    RETURNING 1 INTO v_rows_updated;

    IF v_rows_updated IS NULL THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'No pending approval found for user % on PO % to reject',
            p_user_id, p_order_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ3';
    END IF;

    -- Update purchase order state
    UPDATE rda.purchase_order
    SET state = v_new_state,
        updated = now()
    WHERE id = p_order_id;

    -- Insert history
    INSERT INTO rda.purchase_order_history (
        order_id,
        user_id,
        description,
        prev_state,
        next_state,
        automatic
    ) VALUES (
                 p_order_id,
                 p_user_id,
                 v_description,
                 v_po_state,
                 v_new_state,
                 false
             );
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.purchase_order_save_pdf_creation_date(_po_id bigint, _user_id bigint)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _state VARCHAR;
    _automatic BOOLEAN;
    _rows_updated INT;
BEGIN
    -- lock row and get current state
    SELECT state
    INTO _state
    FROM rda.purchase_order
    WHERE id = _po_id
      AND deleted IS NULL
        FOR UPDATE;

    -- check if exists
    IF NOT FOUND THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'purchase order not found'
            USING ERRCODE = 'T0WZ0';
    END IF;

    -- if not in correct state -> skip silently
    IF _state <> 'PENDING_PDF_GENERATION' THEN
        RETURN;
    END IF;

    -- determine if automatic
    _automatic := (_user_id IS NULL);

    -------------------------------------------------
    -- update pdf creation date + state transition
    -------------------------------------------------
    UPDATE rda.purchase_order
    SET created_document = NOW(),
        state = 'PENDING_ERP_SAVE',
        updated = NOW()
    WHERE id = _po_id
      AND created_document IS NULL;

    GET DIAGNOSTICS _rows_updated = ROW_COUNT;

    -- if nothing updated (already processed), skip history
    IF _rows_updated = 0 THEN
        RETURN;
    END IF;

    -------------------------------------------------
    -- history entry
    -------------------------------------------------
    INSERT INTO rda.purchase_order_history (
        order_id,
        automatic,
        user_id,
        prev_state,
        next_state,
        description
    )
    VALUES (
               _po_id,
               _automatic,
               _user_id,
               'PENDING_PDF_GENERATION',
               'PENDING_ERP_SAVE',
               'PDF generato e ordine pronto per salvataggio ERP'
           );

END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.trg_skip_send_for_ecommerce()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_prev_state varchar;
BEGIN
    -- Execute only when state actually changes to PENDING_SEND
    IF OLD.state IS DISTINCT FROM NEW.state
        AND NEW.state = 'PENDING_SEND'
        AND NEW.type = 'ECOMMERCE' THEN

        v_prev_state := OLD.state;

        UPDATE rda.purchase_order
        SET state = 'CLOSED',
            updated = now()
        WHERE id = NEW.id
          AND state = 'PENDING_SEND';

        INSERT INTO rda.purchase_order_history(
            order_id,
            user_id,
            description,
            prev_state,
            next_state,
            automatic
        )
        VALUES (
                   NEW.id,
                   NULL,
                   'PO automatically moved from PENDING_SEND to CLOSED (type = ECOMMERCE)',
                   v_prev_state,
                   'CLOSED',
                   TRUE
               );

    END IF;

    RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.trigger_notify_closed_with_advance()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _user record;
    _has_advance_payment boolean;
BEGIN
    -- Only act when state changes to PENDING_VERIFICATION (which comes from CLOSED via FSM)
    IF NEW.state = 'PENDING_VERIFICATION'
        AND (OLD.state IS DISTINCT FROM NEW.state) THEN

        -- Check if any payment row has advance_payment = TRUE
        SELECT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM rda.purchase_order_row por
                     JOIN rda.purchase_order_row_payment porp ON porp.purchase_order_row_id = por.id
            WHERE por.order_id = NEW.id
              AND porp.advance_payment IS TRUE
        ) INTO _has_advance_payment;

        IF _has_advance_payment THEN
            FOR _user IN
                SELECT u.id
                FROM users_int."user" u
                         JOIN users_int.role r ON u.role = r.name
                WHERE r.is_afc IS TRUE
                  AND u.notifications_enabled IS TRUE
                LOOP
                    INSERT INTO rda.notification(type, user_id, order_id)
                    VALUES ('PO_CLOSED_WITH_ADVANCE_PAYMENT', _user.id, NEW.id)
                    ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
                END LOOP;
        END IF;
    END IF;

    RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$

functions.name: trigger_po_after_approval_approved
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rda.trigger_po_after_approval_approved()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_all_levels_approved boolean;
    v_next_state varchar;
    v_prev_state varchar;
    v_leasing_threshold numeric(20,2);
BEGIN
    SELECT state INTO v_prev_state FROM rda.purchase_order WHERE id = NEW.order_id;

    IF NEW.state = 'APPROVED' THEN
        -- check if all levels have at least one approval
        SELECT NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT DISTINCT level
            FROM rda.approval a
            WHERE a.order_id = NEW.order_id
            EXCEPT
            SELECT DISTINCT level
            FROM rda.approval a
            WHERE a.order_id = NEW.order_id
              AND a.state = 'APPROVED'
        )
        INTO v_all_levels_approved;

        IF v_all_levels_approved THEN
            -- read leasing threshold from table
            SELECT threshold_value
            INTO v_leasing_threshold
            FROM rda.purchase_order_threshold
            WHERE threshold_name = 'LEASING_MIN_AMOUNT';

            SELECT CASE
                       WHEN total_price >= v_leasing_threshold THEN 'PENDING_LEASING'
                       ELSE 'PENDING_CONTRACT_VERIFICATION'
                       END
            INTO v_next_state
            FROM rda.purchase_order
            WHERE id = NEW.order_id;

            UPDATE rda.purchase_order
            SET state = v_next_state,
                updated = now()
            WHERE id = NEW.order_id;

            INSERT INTO rda.purchase_order_history(
                order_id, user_id, description, prev_state, next_state, automatic
            )
            VALUES (
                       NEW.order_id,
                       NEW.approver_id,
                       'All levels approved, PO moved to ' || v_next_state,
                       v_prev_state,
                       v_next_state,
                       TRUE
                   );
        END IF;
    END IF;

    RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$

 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN

    -- check exists
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM users_int."user" WHERE id = _id) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'User with id % not found', _id USING ERRCODE = 'T0JZ0';
    end if;

    -- anonymize data and disable
    UPDATE users_int."user" SET
        email = 'disabled_user_' || id || '@email.example',
        first_name = 'disabled_user',
        last_name = '' || id,
        state = 'SOFT-DELETED',
        updated_at = now()
    WHERE id = _id;

END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION users_int.user_get_all(_filter_struct json)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _search_pattern varchar;
BEGIN

    SELECT concat('%', _filter_struct ->> 'search_string', '%') INTO _search_pattern;

    RETURN COALESCE(
        (
            SELECT jsonb_agg(users_int.user_get(x.id))
            FROM (
                SELECT u.id
                FROM users_int."user" u
                INNER JOIN users_int.user_state us on u.state = us.name
                WHERE u.email LIKE _search_pattern
                  AND ( _filter_struct ->> 'enabled' IS NULL OR us.enabled = (_filter_struct ->> 'enabled')::bool)
                  AND ( _filter_struct ->> 'role_name' IS NULL OR u.role = _filter_struct ->> 'role_name')
                ORDER BY us.name, u.email
            )x
        ),
        '[]'::jsonb
    );

END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION articles.article_get_all(_type articles.type DEFAULT NULL::articles.type, _search_string text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _result JSON;
BEGIN
    SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(a), '[]'::json)
    INTO _result
    FROM (
             SELECT
                 ar.code,
                 ar.description,
                 ar.type
             FROM articles.article ar
             WHERE
                 (_type IS NULL OR ar.type = _type)
               AND (_search_string IS NULL OR _search_string = ''
                 OR ar.code ILIKE '%' || _search_string || '%'
                 OR ar.description ILIKE '%' || _search_string || '%')
             ORDER BY ar.code
         ) a;

    RETURN _result;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION budgets.budget_get(_id bigint)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _cost_center_budgets jsonb;
    _user_budgets jsonb;
BEGIN

    -- check if exists
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM budgets.budget WHERE id = _id) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Budget with id % not found', _id USING ERRCODE = 'T3JZ0';
    end if;

    -- get cost_center_budgets
    SELECT jsonb_agg(ccb.*) INTO _cost_center_budgets
    FROM
        budgets.cost_center_budget ccb
    WHERE
        ccb.budget_id = _id;

    -- get user_budgets
    SELECT jsonb_agg(x) INTO _user_budgets
    FROM
    (
        SELECT ub.*, u.email as user_email
        FROM budgets.user_budget ub
            LEFT JOIN users_int."user" u on ub.user_id = u.id
        WHERE
        ub.budget_id = _id
    )x;


    -- return json
    RETURN to_jsonb(x)
    FROM (
        SELECT b.*, _cost_center_budgets as cost_center_budgets, _user_budgets as user_budgets
        FROM budgets.budget b
        WHERE b.id = _id
    ) x;

END;
$function$

BEGIN

    SELECT concat('%', _filter_struct ->> 'search_string', '%') INTO _search_pattern;

    -- return json
    RETURN COALESCE(

            SELECT jsonb_agg(x)
            FROM (
                SELECT b.*
                FROM budgets.budget b
                WHERE b.name LIKE _search_pattern
                    AND (_filter_struct->>'year' IS NULL OR b.year = (_filter_struct->>'year')::int)
                ORDER BY b.year DESC, b.name

    );
END;
$function$

functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION budgets.budget_get_all_for_user(_user_id bigint)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN

    -- return json
    RETURN COALESCE(
            (
                SELECT jsonb_agg(tmp)
                FROM (
                                  (
                                      SELECT
                                          concat(b.name, ' (', ccb.cost_center, ')') as name,
                                          ccb.budget_id,
                                          ccb."limit",
                                          ccb.current,
                                          ccb.enabled,
                                          ccb.cost_center,
                                          NULL as user_id
                                      FROM budgets.budget b
                                               INNER JOIN budgets.cost_center_budget ccb ON b.id = ccb.budget_id
                                      WHERE ccb.enabled = TRUE AND ccb.cost_center IN ( SELECT DISTINCT (vub.cost_center) FROM budgets.v_user_budget vub WHERE vub.user_id = _user_id)
                                  )

                                  UNION

                                  (
                                      SELECT
                                          concat(b.name, ' (', u.email, ')') as name,
                                          ub.budget_id,
                                          ub."limit",
                                          ub.current,
                                          ub.enabled,
                                          NULL as cost_center,
                                          ub.user_id
                                      FROM budgets.budget b
                                               INNER JOIN budgets.user_budget ub ON b.id = ub.budget_id
                                               INNER JOIN users_int."user" u on ub.user_id = u.id
                                               INNER JOIN users_int.user_state us on u.state = us.name
                                      WHERE ub.enabled = TRUE AND u.id = _user_id
                                  )
                              ) tmp
            ),
            '[]'::jsonb
           );
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION budgets.cost_center_get(_name character varying)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _users jsonb;
    _groups jsonb;
BEGIN

    -- check if exists
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM budgets.cost_center WHERE name = _name) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Cost center with name % not found', _name USING ERRCODE = 'T2JZ0';
    end if;

    -- get users
    SELECT jsonb_agg(users_int.user_get(x.id)) INTO _users
    FROM (
        SELECT ucc.user_id as id
        FROM budgets.user_cost_center ucc
        WHERE ucc.cost_center = _name
    )x;

    -- get groups
    SELECT jsonb_agg(budgets.group_get(gcc."group")) INTO _groups
    FROM
        budgets.group_cost_center gcc
    WHERE
        gcc.cost_center = _name;

    -- return json
    RETURN to_jsonb(x)
        FROM (
            SELECT cc.*, users_int.user_get(cc.manager_id) as manager, _users as users, _groups as groups
            FROM budgets.cost_center cc
            WHERE cc.name = _name
        ) x;

END;
$function$

                FROM budgets.cost_center cc
                LEFT JOIN users_int."user" u on cc.manager_id = u.id

AS $function$
BEGIN
    -- return json

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION budgets.update_budget_current(_budget_id bigint)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    UPDATE budgets.budget b
    SET current = COALESCE(
            (
                SELECT SUM(ccb.current)
                FROM budgets.cost_center_budget ccb
                WHERE ccb.budget_id = _budget_id
            ),
            0
        )
        +
        COALESCE(
            (
                SELECT SUM(ub.current)
                FROM budgets.user_budget ub
                WHERE ub.budget_id = _budget_id
            ),
            0
        )
    WHERE b.id = _budget_id;
END;
$function$

    SET "limit" = COALESCE(
            (
                SELECT SUM(ccb."limit")
                FROM budgets.cost_center_budget ccb
                WHERE ccb.budget_id = _budget_id
            ),
            0
        )
        +
        COALESCE(
            (
               SELECT SUM(ub."limit")
               FROM budgets.user_budget ub
               WHERE ub.budget_id = _budget_id
            ),
            0
        )
    WHERE b.id = _budget_id;
END;

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION provider_qualifications.category_edit(p_category_id bigint, p_json json)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _doc JSONB;
    _new_name TEXT;
    _current_name TEXT;
BEGIN
    IF NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM provider_qualifications.service_category
        WHERE id = p_category_id
          AND deleted_at IS NULL
    ) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Category with id "%" does not exist or is deleted',
            p_category_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T3QZ0';
    END IF;

    IF p_json::jsonb ? 'name'
        AND (p_json::jsonb ->> 'name') <> '' THEN

        _new_name := trim(lower(p_json::jsonb ->> 'name'));

        SELECT trim(lower(name))
        INTO _current_name
        FROM provider_qualifications.service_category
        WHERE id = p_category_id;

        IF _current_name IS DISTINCT FROM _new_name THEN

            IF EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM provider_qualifications.service_category
                WHERE trim(lower(name)) = _new_name
                  AND id <> p_category_id
                  AND deleted_at IS NULL
            ) THEN
                RAISE EXCEPTION 'Category name "%" already exists',
                    p_json::jsonb ->> 'name'
                    USING ERRCODE = 'T3QZ1';
            END IF;

            UPDATE provider_qualifications.service_category
            SET name = p_json::jsonb ->> 'name',
                updated_at = NOW()
            WHERE id = p_category_id;

        END IF;
    END IF;

    IF p_json::jsonb ? 'document_types'
        AND jsonb_typeof(p_json::jsonb -> 'document_types') = 'array' THEN

        DELETE FROM provider_qualifications.document_type_category dtc
        WHERE dtc.category_id = p_category_id
          AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM jsonb_array_elements(p_json::jsonb -> 'document_types') elem
            WHERE (elem ->> 'id')::BIGINT = dtc.document_type_id
        );

        FOR _doc IN
            SELECT jsonb_array_elements(p_json::jsonb -> 'document_types')
            LOOP
                IF NOT EXISTS (
                    SELECT 1
                    FROM provider_qualifications.document_type
                    WHERE id = (_doc ->> 'id')::BIGINT
                      AND deleted_at IS NULL
                ) THEN
                    RAISE EXCEPTION 'Document type id "%" not found',
                        _doc ->> 'id'
                        USING ERRCODE = 'T9JZ3';
                END IF;

                INSERT INTO provider_qualifications.document_type_category (
                    document_type_id,
                    category_id,
                    required,
                    created_at,
                    updated_at
                )
                VALUES (
                           (_doc ->> 'id')::BIGINT,
                           p_category_id,
                           COALESCE((_doc ->> 'required')::BOOLEAN, FALSE),
                           NOW(),
                           NOW()
                       )
                ON CONFLICT (document_type_id, category_id)
                    DO UPDATE SET
                                  required = EXCLUDED.required,
                                  updated_at = NOW();
            END LOOP;
    END IF;

END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION provider_qualifications.category_get(p_category_id bigint)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    result JSON;
BEGIN
    SELECT json_build_object(
                   'id', sc.id,
                   'name', sc.name,
                   'document_types', COALESCE(
                                   json_agg(
                                   json_build_object(
                                           'document_type', json_build_object(
                                           'id', dt.id,
                                           'name', dt.name
                                                            ),
                                           'required', dtc.required
                                   )
                                           ) FILTER (WHERE dt.id IS NOT NULL),
                                   '[]'::json
                                     )
           )
    INTO result
    FROM provider_qualifications.service_category sc
             LEFT JOIN provider_qualifications.document_type_category dtc
                       ON sc.id = dtc.category_id
                           AND dtc.deleted_at IS NULL
             LEFT JOIN provider_qualifications.document_type dt
                       ON dtc.document_type_id = dt.id
                           AND dt.deleted_at IS NULL
    WHERE sc.id = p_category_id
      AND sc.deleted_at IS NULL
    GROUP BY sc.id, sc.name;

    IF result IS NULL THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Category with id "%" not found',
            p_category_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T3QZ0';
    END IF;

    RETURN result;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION provider_qualifications.category_get_all(_search text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _result JSON;
BEGIN
    SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(category), '[]'::json)
    INTO _result
    FROM (
             SELECT json_build_object(
                            'id', sc.id,
                            'name', sc.name,
                            'document_types', COALESCE(
                                            json_agg(
                                            json_build_object(
                                                    'document_type', json_build_object(
                                                    'id', dt.id,
                                                    'name', dt.name
                                                                     ),
                                                    'required', dtc.required
                                            )
                                                    ) FILTER (WHERE dt.id IS NOT NULL),
                                            '[]'::json
                                              )
                    ) AS category
             FROM provider_qualifications.service_category sc
                      LEFT JOIN provider_qualifications.document_type_category dtc
                                ON sc.id = dtc.category_id
                                    AND dtc.deleted_at IS NULL
                      LEFT JOIN provider_qualifications.document_type dt
                                ON dtc.document_type_id = dt.id
                                    AND dt.deleted_at IS NULL
             WHERE (_search IS NULL OR sc.name ILIKE '%' || _search || '%')
               AND sc.deleted_at IS NULL
             GROUP BY sc.id, sc.name
         ) s;

    RETURN _result;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION provider_qualifications.document_get(p_document_id bigint)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    result JSON;
BEGIN
    SELECT json_build_object(
                   'id', d.id,
                   'file_id', d.file_id,
                   'expire_date', d.expire_date,
                   'provider_id', d.provider_id,
                   'state', d.state,
                   'document_type', json_build_object(
                           'id', dt.id,
                           'name', dt.name
                                    ),
                   'source', d.source,
                   'created_at', d.created_at,
                   'updated_at', d.updated_at
           )
    INTO result
    FROM provider_qualifications.document d
             LEFT JOIN provider_qualifications.document_type dt
                       ON d.document_type_id = dt.id
                           AND dt.deleted_at IS NULL
    WHERE d.id = p_document_id
      AND d.deleted_at IS NULL;

    IF result IS NULL THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Document with id "%" not found',
            p_document_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T6QZ0';
    END IF;

    RETURN result;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION provider_qualifications.document_get_all(_provider_id bigint DEFAULT NULL::bigint, _category_id bigint DEFAULT NULL::bigint, _search text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _result JSON;
    _provider_exists BOOLEAN;
BEGIN
    -- Check if provider exists when a provider_id is given
    IF _provider_id IS NOT NULL THEN
        SELECT EXISTS(
            SELECT 1
            FROM provider_qualifications.provider
            WHERE id = _provider_id
              AND deleted_at IS NULL
        ) INTO _provider_exists;

        IF NOT _provider_exists THEN
            RAISE EXCEPTION 'Provider not exist'
                USING ERRCODE = 'T1QZ3';
        END IF;
    END IF;

    -- Main query
    SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(doc), '[]'::json)
    INTO _result
    FROM (
             SELECT json_build_object(
                            'id', d.id,
                            'file_id', d.file_id,
                            'expire_date', d.expire_date,
                            'provider_id', d.provider_id,
                            'state', d.state,
                            'document_type', json_build_object(
                                    'id', dt.id,
                                    'name', dt.name
                                             ),
                            'source', d.source,
                            'created_at', d.created_at,
                            'updated_at', d.updated_at
                    ) AS doc
             FROM provider_qualifications.document d
                      JOIN provider_qualifications.document_type dt
                           ON d.document_type_id = dt.id
             WHERE (_provider_id IS NULL OR d.provider_id = _provider_id)
               AND (
                 _category_id IS NULL
                     OR EXISTS (
                     SELECT 1
                     FROM provider_qualifications.document_type_category dtc
                     WHERE dtc.document_type_id = dt.id
                       AND dtc.category_id = _category_id
                 )
                 )
               AND (_search IS NULL
                 OR d.source ILIKE '%' || _search || '%'
                 OR dt.name ILIKE '%' || _search || '%')
               AND d.deleted_at IS NULL
             ORDER BY d.created_at DESC
         ) s;

    RETURN _result;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION provider_qualifications.document_updated()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    IF OLD.expire_date IS DISTINCT FROM NEW.expire_date OR
       OLD.document_type_id IS DISTINCT FROM NEW.document_type_id OR
       OLD.state IS DISTINCT FROM NEW.state OR
       OLD.file_id IS DISTINCT FROM NEW.file_id
    THEN
        PERFORM provider_qualifications.calculate_provider_qualification(NEW.provider_id);
    END IF;

    RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION provider_qualifications.provider_category_edit(p_provider_id bigint, p_category_id bigint, p_critical boolean DEFAULT false)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _provider_category_id BIGINT;
BEGIN

    -- Find the provider-category association
    SELECT id INTO _provider_category_id
    FROM provider_qualifications.provider_category
    WHERE provider_id = p_provider_id
      AND category_id = p_category_id
      AND deleted_at IS NULL;

    IF _provider_category_id IS NULL THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Provider category association for Provider % and Category % not found', p_provider_id, p_category_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T4QZ0';
    END IF;

    -- Update the provider-category association
    UPDATE provider_qualifications.provider_category
    SET
        critical = p_critical,
        updated_at = NOW()
    WHERE id = _provider_category_id
      AND deleted_at IS NULL;

    IF NOT FOUND THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Provider category association with ID % not found', _provider_category_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T4QZ0';
    END IF;

END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION provider_qualifications.provider_category_get_all(_provider_id bigint, _search text DEFAULT NULL::text, _status text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _result JSON;
BEGIN
    SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(cat), '[]'::json)
    INTO _result
    FROM (
             SELECT json_build_object(
                            'id', pc.id,
                            'category', json_build_object(
                                    'id', c.id,
                                    'name', c.name,
                                    'document_types', (
                                        SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(dt), '[]'::json)
                                        FROM (
                                                 SELECT json_build_object(
                                                                'document_type', json_build_object(
                                                                 'id', dt.id,
                                                                 'name', dt.name
                                                                                 ),
                                                                'required', dtc.required
                                                        ) AS dt
                                                 FROM provider_qualifications.document_type_category dtc
                                                          JOIN provider_qualifications.document_type dt
                                                               ON dt.id = dtc.document_type_id
                                                 WHERE dtc.category_id = c.id
                                             ) sub
                                    )
                                        ),
                            'critical', pc.critical,
                            'state', pc.state,
                            'created_at', pc.created_at,
                            'updated_at', pc.updated_at
                    ) AS cat
             FROM provider_qualifications.provider_category pc
                      JOIN provider_qualifications.service_category c ON c.id = pc.category_id
             WHERE pc.provider_id = _provider_id
               AND (_search IS NULL OR c.name ILIKE '%' || _search || '%')
               AND (_status IS NULL OR pc.state = _status)
               AND pc.deleted_at IS NULL
             ORDER BY c.name
         ) s;

    RETURN _result;
END;
$function$

functions.name: provider_category_new
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION provider_qualifications.provider_category_new(p_provider_id bigint, p_category_id bigint, p_critical boolean DEFAULT false)
 RETURNS bigint
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _new_provider_category_id BIGINT;
    _existing_count INT;
BEGIN
    -- Validate that provider exists
    SELECT COUNT(*) INTO _existing_count
    FROM provider_qualifications.provider
    WHERE id = p_provider_id
      AND deleted_at IS NULL;

    IF _existing_count = 0 THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Provider ID % does not exist', p_provider_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T1QZ0';
    END IF;

    -- Validate that category exists
    SELECT COUNT(*) INTO _existing_count
    FROM provider_qualifications.service_category
    WHERE id = p_category_id
      AND deleted_at IS NULL;

    IF _existing_count = 0 THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Category ID % does not exist', p_category_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T3QZ0';
    END IF;

    -- Check if the association already exists
    SELECT COUNT(*) INTO _existing_count
    FROM provider_qualifications.provider_category
    WHERE provider_id = p_provider_id
      AND category_id = p_category_id
      AND deleted_at IS NULL;

    IF _existing_count > 0 THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Provider % already associated with Category %', p_provider_id, p_category_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T4QZ1';
    END IF;

    -- Insert the new provider-category association
    INSERT INTO provider_qualifications.provider_category (
        provider_id,
        category_id,
        critical,
        state,
        created_at,
        updated_at
    )
    VALUES (
               p_provider_id,
               p_category_id,
               p_critical,
               'NEW',
               NOW(),
               NOW()
           )
    RETURNING id INTO _new_provider_category_id;

    RETURN _new_provider_category_id;
END;
$function$

functions.name: provider_draft_new
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION provider_qualifications.provider_draft_new(p_json json)
 RETURNS bigint
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _provider_id BIGINT;
BEGIN
    -- Insert provider draft
    INSERT INTO provider_qualifications.provider(
        state,
        company_name,
        vat_number,
        cf,
        address,
        city,
        postal_code,
        province,
        country,
        language,
        erp_id,
        created_at,
        updated_at
    )
    SELECT
        'DRAFT',
        COALESCE(p.company_name, ''),
        NULLIF(p.vat_number, ''),
        NULLIF(p.cf, ''),
        UPPER(COALESCE(p.address, '')),
        UPPER(COALESCE(p.city, '')),
        NULLIF(p.postal_code, ''),
        NULLIF(p.province, ''),
        COALESCE(NULLIF(p.country, ''), 'IT'),
        CASE
            WHEN p.language IS NOT NULL AND p.language <> ''
                THEN p.language::provider_qualifications.language
            ELSE NULL
            END,
        CASE
            WHEN p.erp_id IS NOT NULL AND p.erp_id <> ''
                THEN p.erp_id::BIGINT
            ELSE NULL
            END,
        NOW(),
        NOW()
    FROM jsonb_to_record(p_json::jsonb) AS p(
                                             company_name TEXT,
                                             vat_number   TEXT,
                                             cf           TEXT,
                                             address      TEXT,
                                             city         TEXT,
                                             postal_code  TEXT,
                                             province     TEXT,
                                             country      TEXT,
                                             language     TEXT,
                                             erp_id       TEXT,
                                             ref          JSON
        )
    RETURNING id INTO _provider_id;

    -- Insert provider reference if JSON has a valid ref object
    IF p_json::jsonb ? 'ref'
        AND jsonb_typeof(p_json::jsonb -> 'ref') = 'object' THEN

        INSERT INTO provider_qualifications.provider_ref(
            provider_id,
            first_name,
            last_name,
            email,
            created_at,
            updated_at
        )
        SELECT
            _provider_id,
            NULLIF(r.first_name, ''),
            NULLIF(r.last_name, ''),
            NULLIF(r.email, ''),
            NOW(),
            NOW()
        FROM jsonb_to_record(p_json::jsonb -> 'ref') AS r(
                                                          first_name TEXT,
                                                          last_name  TEXT,
                                                          email      TEXT
            );
    END IF;

    RETURN _provider_id;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION provider_qualifications.provider_get(p_provider_id bigint, _show_deleted boolean DEFAULT false)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_result JSON;
BEGIN
    SELECT jsonb_build_object(
                   'id', p.id,
                   'company_name', p.company_name,
                   'state', p.state,
                   'default_payment_method',
                       CASE
                           WHEN pm.code IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
                                   'code', pm.code,
                                   'description', pm.description)
                       END,
                   'vat_number', p.vat_number,
                   'cf', p.cf,
                   'address', p.address,
                   'city', p.city,
                   'postal_code', p.postal_code,
                   'province', p.province,
                   'country', p.country,
                   'language', p.language,
                   'erp_id', p.erp_id,
                   'refs', provider_qualifications.provider_refs_get_all(p.id),
                   'skip_qualification_validation', p.skip_qualification_validation
           )::json
    INTO v_result
    FROM provider_qualifications.provider p
             LEFT JOIN provider_qualifications.payment_method pm
                       ON pm.code = p.default_payment_method
    WHERE p.id = p_provider_id
      AND (_show_deleted IS TRUE OR p.deleted_at IS NULL);

    -- If not found, raise an exception
    IF v_result IS NULL THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Provider with id % not found', p_provider_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T1QZ0';
    END IF;

    RETURN v_result;
END;
$function$

functions.name: provider_get_all
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION provider_qualifications.provider_get_all(p_search_string text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_state text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_usable boolean DEFAULT NULL::boolean)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_result JSON;
BEGIN
    -- Validate state if provided
    IF p_state IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM provider_qualifications.provider_state ps
        WHERE ps.name = p_state
    ) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Invalid provider state: %', p_state
            USING ERRCODE = 'T1QZ3';
    END IF;

    -- Main query
    SELECT COALESCE(
                   jsonb_agg(
                           jsonb_build_object(
                                   'id', p.id,
                                   'company_name', p.company_name,
                                   'state', p.state,
                                   'default_payment_method',
                                   CASE
                                       WHEN pm.code IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
                                               'code', pm.code,
                                               'description', pm.description)
                                       END,
                                   'vat_number', p.vat_number,
                                   'cf', p.cf,
                                   'address', p.address,
                                   'city', p.city,
                                   'postal_code', p.postal_code,
                                   'province', p.province,
                                   'country', p.country,
                                'language', p.language,
                                    'erp_id', p.erp_id,
                                    'skip_qualification_validation', p.skip_qualification_validation,
                                    'ref',
                                   (
                                       SELECT jsonb_build_object(
                                                      'first_name', r.first_name,
                                                      'last_name', r.last_name,
                                                      'email', r.email
                                              )
                                       FROM provider_qualifications.provider_ref r
                                       WHERE r.provider_id = p.id
                                       ORDER BY r.id
                                       LIMIT 1
                                   )
                           )
                   ),
                   '[]'::jsonb
           )::json
    INTO v_result
    FROM provider_qualifications.provider p
             LEFT JOIN provider_qualifications.provider_state ps
                       ON p.state = ps.name
             LEFT JOIN provider_qualifications.payment_method pm
                       ON pm.code = p.default_payment_method
    WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL
      AND (p_state IS NULL OR p.state = p_state)
      AND (p_usable IS NULL OR ps.usable = p_usable)
      AND (
        p_search_string IS NULL
            OR p_search_string = ''
            OR p.company_name ILIKE '%' || p_search_string || '%'
            OR p.vat_number ILIKE '%' || p_search_string || '%'
            OR p.cf ILIKE '%' || p_search_string || '%'
            OR p.address ILIKE '%' || p_search_string || '%'
            OR p.city ILIKE '%' || p_search_string || '%'
            OR p.postal_code ILIKE '%' || p_search_string || '%'
            OR p.province ILIKE '%' || p_search_string || '%'
            OR p.country ILIKE '%' || p_search_string || '%'
            OR EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM provider_qualifications.provider_ref r
            WHERE r.provider_id = p.id
              AND (
                r.first_name ILIKE '%' || p_search_string || '%'
                    OR r.last_name ILIKE '%' || p_search_string || '%'
                    OR r.email ILIKE '%' || p_search_string || '%'
                )
        )
        );

    RETURN v_result;
END;
$function$
