CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION provider_qualifications.provider_new(p_json json)
 RETURNS bigint
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _provider_id BIGINT;
BEGIN
    -- Validate that 'ref' exists
    IF NOT (p_json::jsonb ? 'ref') THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Provider reference (ref) is required'
            USING ERRCODE = 'T1QZ3';
    END IF;

    -- Validate default payment method if provided
    IF p_json::jsonb ? 'default_payment_method'
        AND NULLIF(p_json->>'default_payment_method','') IS NOT NULL THEN

        IF NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM provider_qualifications.payment_method
            WHERE code = (p_json->>'default_payment_method')
        ) THEN
            RAISE EXCEPTION
                'Payment method code "%" does not exist',
                (p_json->>'default_payment_method')
                USING ERRCODE = 'T1QZ3';
        END IF;

    END IF;

    -- Insert provider
    INSERT INTO provider_qualifications.provider(
        state,
        company_name,
        vat_number,
        cf,
        address,
        city,
        postal_code,
        province,
        country,
        language,
        erp_id,
        default_payment_method,
        created_at,
        updated_at
    )
    SELECT
        'DRAFT',
        p.company_name,
        NULLIF(p.vat_number, ''),
        NULLIF(p.cf, ''),
        UPPER(p.address),
        UPPER(p.city),
        p.postal_code,
        NULLIF(p.province, ''),
        COALESCE(p.country, 'IT'),
        COALESCE(p.language, 'it')::provider_qualifications.language,
        CASE
            WHEN p.erp_id IS NOT NULL AND p.erp_id <> ''
                THEN p.erp_id::BIGINT
            ELSE NULL
            END,
        CASE
            WHEN p.default_payment_method IS NOT NULL
                AND p.default_payment_method <> ''
                THEN p.default_payment_method::CHAR(6)
            ELSE NULL
            END,
        NOW(),
        NOW()
    FROM jsonb_to_record(p_json::jsonb) AS p(
                                             company_name TEXT,
                                             vat_number TEXT,
                                             cf TEXT,
                                             address TEXT,
                                             city TEXT,
                                             postal_code TEXT,
                                             province TEXT,
                                             country TEXT,
                                             language TEXT,
                                             erp_id TEXT,
                                             default_payment_method TEXT,
                                             ref JSON
        )
    RETURNING id INTO _provider_id;

    -- Insert provider reference
    INSERT INTO provider_qualifications.provider_ref(
        provider_id,
        first_name,
        last_name,
        email,
        created_at,
        updated_at
    )
    SELECT
        _provider_id,
        NULLIF(r.first_name,''),
        NULLIF(r.last_name,''),
        NULLIF(r.email,''),
        NOW(),
        NOW()
    FROM jsonb_to_record((p_json::jsonb)->'ref') AS r(
                                                      first_name TEXT,
                                                      last_name TEXT,
                                                      email TEXT
        );

    RETURN _provider_id;
END;
$function$

functions.name: set_default_payment_method
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION provider_qualifications.set_default_payment_method(p_provider_id bigint, p_payment_method_code character)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    -- Check provider exists (and not soft-deleted)
    IF NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM provider_qualifications.provider
        WHERE id = p_provider_id
          AND deleted_at IS NULL
    ) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION
            'Provider with id % does not exist or is deleted',
            p_provider_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T1QZ0';
    END IF;

    -- Validate payment method code
    IF NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM provider_qualifications.payment_method
        WHERE code = p_payment_method_code
    ) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION
            'Payment method code "%" does not exist',
            p_payment_method_code
            USING ERRCODE = 'T8QZ3';
    END IF;

    -- First writer wins: only set if not already set
    UPDATE provider_qualifications.provider
    SET default_payment_method = p_payment_method_code,
        updated_at = NOW()
    WHERE id = p_provider_id
      AND default_payment_method IS NULL;

    -- If already set, this UPDATE affects 0 rows and is ignored
END;
$function$

functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION provider_qualifications.update_provider_category_state(p_provider_category_id bigint, p_new_state character varying)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _old_state VARCHAR;
BEGIN
    SELECT state
    INTO _old_state
    FROM provider_qualifications.provider_category
    WHERE id = p_provider_category_id
        FOR UPDATE;

    -- No change → do nothing
    IF _old_state IS NOT DISTINCT FROM p_new_state THEN
        RETURN;
    END IF;

    -- Update state
    UPDATE provider_qualifications.provider_category
    SET state = p_new_state,
        updated_at = NOW()
    WHERE id = p_provider_category_id;

    -- Insert history
    INSERT INTO provider_qualifications.provider_category_history (
        provider_category_id,
        old_state,
        new_state
    )
    VALUES (
               p_provider_category_id,
               _old_state,
               p_new_state
           );
END;
$function$

materializedViews.name: notification
materializedViews.definition:
SELECT notification_type,
    provider_id,
    provider_name,
    event_time,
    payload
   FROM ( SELECT 'PROVIDER_CATEGORY_STATE_CHANGE'::text AS notification_type,
            p.id AS provider_id,
            p.company_name AS provider_name,
            pch.created_at AS event_time,
            jsonb_build_object('provider_category_state_change', jsonb_build_object('category_id', sc.id, 'category_name', sc.name, 'old_state', pch.old_state, 'new_state', pch.new_state)) AS payload
           FROM (((provider_qualifications.provider_category_history pch
             JOIN provider_qualifications.provider_category pc ON ((pc.id = pch.provider_category_id)))
             JOIN provider_qualifications.provider p ON ((p.id = pc.provider_id)))
             JOIN provider_qualifications.service_category sc ON ((sc.id = pc.category_id)))
          WHERE ((pc.deleted_at IS NULL) AND (p.deleted_at IS NULL) AND (sc.deleted_at IS NULL) AND ((pch.new_state)::text = 'NOT_QUALIFIED'::text))
        UNION ALL
         SELECT 'DOCUMENT_EXPIRATION'::text AS notification_type,
            pr.id AS provider_id,
            pr.company_name AS provider_name,
            d.expire_date AS event_time,
            jsonb_build_object('document_expiration', jsonb_build_object('document_type_id', dt.id, 'document_type', dt.name, 'document_id', d.id, 'expire_date', d.expire_date)) AS payload
           FROM ((provider_qualifications.document d
             JOIN provider_qualifications.provider pr ON ((d.provider_id = pr.id)))
             JOIN provider_qualifications.document_type dt ON ((d.document_type_id = dt.id)))
          WHERE ((d.deleted_at IS NULL) AND (pr.deleted_at IS NULL) AND (dt.deleted_at IS NULL))
        UNION ALL
         SELECT 'PROVIDER_DRAFT'::text AS notification_type,
            p.id AS provider_id,
            p.company_name AS provider_name,
            p.created_at AS event_time,
            NULL::jsonb AS payload
           FROM provider_qualifications.provider p
          WHERE ((p.deleted_at IS NULL) AND ((p.state)::text = 'DRAFT'::text))) notifications
  ORDER BY event_time DESC;
